              ROOT CAUSE LOCKED (from CHANGELOG entry + observation 7874):
                Workspace-level `turbo lint` runs every package's
                `lint` script but does NOT run `next build`. Next.js
                production build runs an additional ESLint pass with
                stricter rules (parser-level + Next-specific rules
                like react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, @next/next/no-img-element).
                Items 2/5/7/8 shipped over 5+ days with that pass
                never enforced → 27-error debt accumulated unseen
                until Items 7+8 Visual QA forced a dev container
                rebuild (Dockerfile:22 runs `pnpm --filter
                @marine-guardian/web build` → fails fast).

              Option D closes the loop: the gate that today caught
              the debt becomes the gate that future ships MUST pass
              before squash-merge. No process drift in 5-day cycles.
